name: invinoveritas
description: Lightning-paid reasoning and decision intelligence for autonomous agents. Pay-per-insight via Bitcoin Lightning (L402). No accounts, no subscriptions, no KYC.

tools.name: reason
tools.description: Strategic reasoning via natural language. Provide a question and receive a detailed, thoughtful answer.

tools.name: decision
tools.description: Structured decision intelligence. Returns a JSON object with decision, confidence score, reasoning, and risk level.
